headline: Energy Stocks Are Crushing the Market in 2026 — and Trump Could Keep the Rally Alive
summary: For the last two years, investors were trained to chase anything tied to artificial intelligence. Semiconductor stocks. Cloud stocks. Power-grid plays. If it touched a data center, Wall Street wanted in. Then 2026 happened. Suddenly, the market’s leadership changed. The flashy growth names cooled off while one of the market’s oldest industries started printing gains ... Energy Stocks Are Crushing the Market in 2026 — and Trump Could Keep the Rally Alive

headline: Valero Energy: A Repeat Of The Mega-Cycle From 2022
summary: Valero Energy is structurally advantaged due to the Strait of Hormuz closure, enabling superior access to crude. See why VLO stock is upgraded to a buy.
